summary: Tested P1 features: PDF file upload in Pro Catalog and WebSocket notifications integration. Backend file upload works perfectly (9/11 tests passed). WebSocket endpoint returns 404 - critical configuration issue.

critical.issue: Socket.IO WebSocket endpoint returns 404. Root cause: uvicorn runs 'server:app' but Socket.IO is wrapped in 'server:socket_app'. The socket_app wraps FastAPI with socketio.ASGIApp but this wrapped app is never used.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend useWebSocket hook connects to backend but Socket.IO endpoint not available. Hook is correctly implemented but backend config prevents connection.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' and 'textShadow*' style props

action_items: CRITICAL: Update supervisor config to run 'server:socket_app' instead of 'server:app' for Socket.IO to work
The fix is in /etc/supervisor/conf.d/*.conf - change 'command=/root/.venv/bin/uvicorn server:app' to 'command=/root/.venv/bin/uvicorn server:socket_app'
critical_code_review_comments: File upload endpoint POST /api/pro/upload-file correctly validates file types, requires auth, and saves files to /api/uploads/
Static files correctly mounted at /api/uploads for kubernetes proxy compatibility
useWebSocket hook at /app/frontend/hooks/useWebSocket.ts correctly implemented with socket.io-client
NotificationCenter correctly imports and uses useWebSocket hook with 60s polling fallback
Profile page correctly shows 'MENTOR' badge for professional users (line 204)
Catalog upload button shows 'Choisir un fichier' text (line 821)

success_rate.backend: 82% (9/11 tests passed - 2 WebSocket tests failed due to config)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review - all P1 features implemented correctly)

seed_data_creation: Test files uploaded during pytest are auto-generated fake PDFs
context_for_next_testing_agent: File upload backend works perfectly - all 9 tests passed. WebSocket is NOT working because uvicorn runs server:app instead of server:socket_app. The fix is simple: change supervisor config. Frontend code is correct - useWebSocket hook and NotificationCenter use it with fallback polling.

features_tested.details: Returns 404 - uvicorn runs wrong app (server:app vs server:socket_app)
Imports and uses useWebSocket with 60s polling fallback

rca_of_the_issue: WebSocket 404 Issue: The server.py creates socket_app = socketio.ASGIApp(sio, app) at line 10662 which wraps the FastAPI app with Socket.IO. However, the supervisor config at /etc/supervisor/conf.d/*.conf runs 'uvicorn server:app' instead of 'uvicorn server:socket_app'. This means the Socket.IO wrapper is never used and /socket.io/ endpoint returns 404. FIX: Update command to use server:socket_app.
